title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers to automate daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. The video demonstrates installation, real-world use cases like file organization and task scheduling, and integration with Gmail and Google Calendar. Claude Cowork is available only in Pro and Max subscription plans.
